item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Officially my favorite.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
You overdid it a bit with

Became distracted by Dr. Moore’s laser

Too silly for a non-J entry.

Basically the demon from Disenchantment.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: "Eh?" says Abbasi. Canadian goal herder and demon domesticator confirmed

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I share Kakroom's opinion. It's done well enough to survive and there are a few lines which thrive ("…which it promptly was perceived to be seen eating."), so novote from me. Maybe there are more in-on-it connections with the musical than I'm getting.

One nitpick: SCP-2576’s research team and the incident logs take place at Site-17 but SCP-2576 is said to be at Area-12 in the containment procedures (Area-12 isn't mentioned again after here). It's possible that it and Joseph moved to Area-12 after the initial testing at Site-17, but it's equally likely from the looks of it that this was unintentional.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I laughed after reading through this one. I like i a lot and it has a great idea beyond just being a rainbow goat. Needs more art.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
djkaktus I think you missed a minor typo. In the sentence

and is capable of moving between walls and other solid objects

'between' should be 'through', no? I mean, I can move between walls and other solid objects, and I'm no anomaly. Right?

Right?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I uh, I don't even know what to say. I guess it renders me speechless, one of the great powers no doubt.

U have my upgoat.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The whole "it hates humanity but it's so cute!" thing has been done before but I still love it.
The relationship with Mr. Abassi made it for me, definite upvote.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I like the inoculation screw and Abbasi's a fun character, but I don't think I can find it in me to upvote another 'adorable impotent Cthulhu' article when it's presented as straightforwardly as this.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is hilarious. Pooki is adorable and the shepherd's response to it is refreshing and endearing.

You earn my upgoat.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I'd argue this new image is just as good as the old one, depending on one's perspective a bit better even.

train when

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: kaktus I love you.

item.title: Re: Staff Post - Open
item.content:encoded: Good!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: something about Pooki makes me feel like he'd actually be funny to be around once you got used to him, especially if he can manage at least a back-and-forth.

item.title: Re: Staff Post - Open
item.content:encoded: New image is in compliance with the images policy. Good times.

item.title: Staff Post - Open
item.content:encoded:
Images used in posted articles must comply with the site's image policy. A source must be provided on the discussion page and the source must be compatible with the site's license. The author will be notified after this posting via Wikidot PM and will have 48 hours to properly source the image before it is edited out of the page.

EDIT: Timer removed

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Where's the picture from?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The "adorable eldritch horror" trope has been pretty played out, but the way the characters nonchalantly react to this and how they treat Pooki is what made this for me. The fact that Pooki seems resigned to the treatment he gets makes this even better.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is a really clever play on memetics, and physical entities.

I also enjoyed the specific instructions rather than the generic 'YOU HAVE BEEN INNOCULATED' message. Great bit of worldbuilding, honestly.

Upvoted for a really great concept, and great execution.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I always like it when things remind me of memetic emu.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That was lovely :D Pooki is a nice goat. The juxtaposition of the power of the entity and its present condition is extremely well done, as is the method by which he was contained by Mr. Abbasi.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I enjoyed this. The calm acceptance of Mr. Abbasi really sold it for me. "Eh, I've got an eldritch abomination stuck to me, but it looks like a rainbow goat. Could be worse."

Pooki reminded me of Om at the beginning of "Small Gods". Except for being evil instead of divinely amoral.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
it's mildly amusing but i feel like i've seen the 'cute thing that feigns lovecraftian god' just one too many times to upvote this, especially as it plays the trope extremely straight with very little narrative or overarching theme. it's certainly very competent and the first interview is especially enjoyable but this is so derivative i really did not enjoy on a level which would compel me to upvote. if pooki's past were expanded upon through visions or something or perhaps relation with pooki himself - kind of the old war dog recounting tales of his youth sorta deal - it might prove to subvert that formula enough to feel truly original, but i have a feeling that'd just irrevocably alter the tone of what you have here.

-1 reluctant downvote i like pooki but this ground feels pretty well tread to the point where the content pretty much eludes me

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: BRING BACK TRAIN NOW

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"What do I do, Pooki?"

"DESTROY THE CHILD. CORRUPT THEM ALL."

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
yeah that's cool

Also, this is totally an eldritch teenager going through the 'it's not a phase, mom' phase.

EDIT: Praise to the cloud people?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Outstanding. I especially enjoyed the last incident report.

FYI, I think there's a typo in the first interview report. It says "Black ightling" instead of "Black lightning" near the beginning.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: ahhhhhhh!!! it's back!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I maintain what I said in chat, this is extremely silly and jokey but it's the exact kind of weird joke I love to see in scps from time to time so +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Glad that it is back again.

item.title: Gote
item.content:encoded:
This is a silly thing I wrote a few years ago and rewrote because I want it to be real. So here you go.

Thanks to ARD, Alex Jones, Decibelle, and others who looked at this and said "yeah that's cool".

+Image
-Image

https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Goat_-_Colchester_Zoo.jpg
This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-Share Alike 2.0 Generic license.
